queries.name: Semantic Brand Asset Discovery
queries.pain_point: Static query patterns unable to handle complex retrieval needs - 42% of AI Assistant queries require 2+ clarifying questions
queries.description: Find brand assets using natural language queries that understand intent beyond keywords - eliminating need for clarifying questions
queries.example_esql:
FROM brand_assets METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(asset_description, "modern minimalist logo design for technology startup")
  AND approval_status == "Approved"
| KEEP asset_id, asset_name, asset_description, asset_type, brand_name, tags, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 10

queries.name: Weighted Hybrid Search - Balancing Semantic and Exact Match
queries.pain_point: No ability to combine multiple specialized retrieval strategies - engineers spend 2-3 days writing new Query DSL for new requirements
queries.description: Advanced retrieval optimization: Balance semantic understanding (75% weight) with exact brand name matching (25% weight) for precision
queries.example_esql:
FROM brand_assets METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(asset_description, "Adobe Creative Cloud promotional banner", {"boost": 0.75})
   OR MATCH(brand_name, "Adobe Creative Cloud", {"boost": 0.25})
  AND asset_type == "Banner"
| KEEP asset_id, asset_name, brand_name, asset_type, tags, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 15

queries.name: Fuzzy Asset Search with Typo Tolerance
queries.pain_point: Static query patterns unable to handle complex retrieval needs - users make typos in asset searches
queries.description: Best practice: Handle misspellings and typos automatically without requiring query rewrites or user corrections
queries.example_esql:
FROM brand_assets METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(asset_name, "photoshop templete desing", {"fuzziness": "AUTO"})
  AND file_format IN ("PSD", "AI", "INDD")
| KEEP asset_id, asset_name, asset_description, file_format, brand_name, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 20

queries.name: Multi-Term Precision Search with Minimum Match
queries.pain_point: Inability to reason about retrieval quality and iterate - 31% of responses rated unhelpful, 68% due to poor document retrieval
queries.description: Advanced precision control: Require at least 3 out of 5 query terms to match, reducing noise and improving retrieval quality
queries.example_esql:
FROM ai_assistant_conversations METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(query_text, "configure brand asset approval workflow automation", {
    "operator": "OR",
    "minimum_should_match": 3
  })
  AND quality_rating == "Poor"
  AND helpful == false
| KEEP conversation_id, query_text, response_text, retrieval_strategy, quality_rating, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 25

queries.name: Conversation-Aware Contextual Retrieval
queries.pain_point: Limited context understanding across multi-turn conversations - each query to Elasticsearch is independent and stateless
queries.description: Retrieve multi-turn conversations to analyze context patterns and improve stateful retrieval strategies
queries.example_esql:
FROM ai_assistant_conversations METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(query_text, "how do I export that asset in different format")
  AND conversation_turn > 1
  AND context_from_previous_turn IS NOT NULL
| KEEP conversation_id, query_text, conversation_turn, context_from_previous_turn, retrieved_documents, helpful, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 15

queries.name: Retrieval Quality Incident Debug Search
queries.pain_point: Difficulty debugging poor retrieval results - 30-60 minutes per incident with limited visibility
queries.description: Find similar retrieval failures using exact phrase matching to quickly identify patterns and reduce debug time
queries.example_esql:
FROM retrieval_quality_incidents METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH_PHRASE(resolution_notes, "embedding model mismatch", {"slop": 2})
  AND debug_time_minutes > 30
  AND resolved == true
| KEEP incident_id, user_query, failure_reason, debug_time_minutes, resolution_notes, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 10

queries.name: Retrieval Experiment A/B Test Results Search
queries.pain_point: No framework for retrieval experimentation and optimization - 3-week engineering project to evaluate new embedding models
queries.description: Find high-performing retrieval experiments with specific quality thresholds to accelerate model evaluation
queries.example_esql:
FROM retrieval_experiments METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(test_query, "brand asset search with filters")
  AND precision_at_5 >= 0.80
  AND recall_at_10 >= 0.70
  AND deployed_to_production == false
| KEEP experiment_id, experiment_name, retrieval_strategy, embedding_model, precision_at_5, recall_at_10, mrr_score, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 20

queries.name: Enriched Asset Search with Customer Context
queries.pain_point: Static query patterns unable to handle complex retrieval needs - need to combine asset search with customer account details
queries.description: Combine semantic asset search with customer account enrichment for personalized retrieval results
queries.example_esql:
FROM brand_assets METADATA _score
| WHERE MATCH(asset_description, "healthcare patient education infographic")
  AND approval_status == "Approved"
| LOOKUP JOIN customer_accounts ON customer_account_id
| WHERE customer_accounts.industry == "Healthcare"
  AND customer_accounts.tier IN ("Enterprise", "Premium")
| KEEP asset_id, asset_name, asset_description, brand_name, customer_accounts.company_name, customer_accounts.tier, _score
| SORT _score DESC
| LIMIT 10
